items.source_problem: Astronomicon intake initially failed before task start due to missing/invalid route template and UTF-8 BOM.
items.why_it_matters: Owner should not need manual encoding repair to start a registered task.
items.future_fix: Add preflight encoding checker + auto-remediation command in intake toolchain.

items.source_problem: Task start ACK template drift risk between corridor template and task-specific generated ACK shape.
items.why_it_matters: Shape drift can break downstream report parsers and cap reasoning.
items.future_fix: Add schema lock + regression fixture for start ACK template.

items.source_problem: Hard red-team and cap closure remain partially manual/report-local.
items.why_it_matters: Manual cap-state handling can hide contradictions across tasks.
items.future_fix: Introduce immutable cap-state ledger writer/checker with cross-task index.

items.source_problem: Owner-facing RU/EN lane validation still depends on manual discipline.
items.why_it_matters: Language drift can invalidate Owner contract and cause ambiguity.
items.future_fix: Ship bundle-level RU/EN lane checker for report roots.

items.source_problem: Manual Logos pipeline registration is candidate and lacks machine schema enforcement.
items.why_it_matters: Without schema checks, corridor reuse quality will drift between tasks.
items.future_fix: Create schema + checker for manual pipeline registration record.
